doc.source: The immutable GitHub revision and NAR hash are the exact source identity packaged by Semu and match the repository's locked nixpkgs melonDS dependency graph.
doc.state_patch: The same upstream patch anchors configured relative assets in melonDS's XDG config directory, anchors writable external firmware copies there, and reads a ROM-adjacent .sav only when isolated state has no save yet.
doc.rendering: The directly linked game phase preserves semantic top/bottom lane identity after both LCD draws. The post-UI phase runs after splash and OSD drawing and immediately before SwapBuffers. No inactive or teardown report exists.
doc.touch: The Qt input consumer snapshots ABI 2 pointer geometry only after both phases succeed, maps mouse/tablet/touch input through semantic bottom surface 1, rejects bezel presses, clamps captured motion, and sends returned native pixels directly to melonDS.
doc.states: The pinned frontend supports native savestate slots. Semu remaps only slot 1 to its global Ctrl+S and Ctrl+A action ABI while preserving the upstream shortcuts for slots 2 through 8.
